'''QT-QC''' was a [[CLL-8 binary load lifter]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] found in the village of [[Aurilia]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].
